title: BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED — Tier upgrade recorded
description: RUNTIME CONTRACT. Every payload published on the bus by BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.TIE with routing key 'BNK.RLVR.EVT.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADED.BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED' MUST validate against this schema. Per ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 Rule 3, the payload is a domain event DDD: data of the upward tier transition (a coherent atomic state-change of the BNK.RLVR.OBJ.BSP.001.TIER_CHANGE aggregate). It is NOT a snapshot of the read model BNK.RLVR.RES.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADE and NOT a field patch. The 'direction' field is constrained to UPGRADE (upward direction) for Epic 1 scope; downward crossings (DEMOTION) are out of scope and will be contracted in a future epic via BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.TIER_DOWNGRADE_RECORDED. Correlation key: 'case_id'. Resolution path: consumers wishing to obtain the canonical beneficiary identifier (OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.internal_id) MUST query CAP.REF.001.BEN with 'case_id'. The producer does NOT carry the canonical beneficiary identifier on the bus.

transition_id.description: Unique identifier of the upward tier transition. Stable across replays; suitable for idempotency keys at the consumer side.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case. Resolution path to OBJ.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_RECORD.internal_id is the consumer's responsibility — query CAP.REF.001.BEN with this value. The producer never carries 'internal_id' on the wire (privacy + decoupling per ADR-BCM-URBA-0009).

previous_tier.description: Tier code BEFORE the upward transition (e.g. 'T0', 'T1'). Domain rule: must be strictly lower than 'new_tier' (upward direction).

new_tier.description: Tier code AFTER the upward transition (e.g. 'T1', 'T2', 'T3'). Domain rule: must be strictly higher than 'previous_tier' for direction=UPGRADE.

direction.description: Transition direction. CONSTRAINED to 'UPGRADE' (upward) for Epic 1. Downward transitions (DEMOTION) belong to a separate resource event BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.TIER_DOWNGRADE_RECORDED in a future epic. Both 'const' and single-value 'enum' are declared for cross-validator compatibility (Draft 2020-12 'const' + Draft-7-compatible 'enum' fallback).

trigger.description: Trigger source of the transition. ALGORITHM = computed by the autonomy-tier engine from behavioural signals. PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE = forced by a prescriber override (BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.ARB).

score_at_time.description: Behavioural score value at the time the transition was recorded. Snapshotted from BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.SCO at the transition timestamp (out-of-band correlation; not re-queried by consumers).

transition_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the upward transition was recorded by BNK.RLVR.CAP.BSP.001.TIE.

est_sortie_programme.description: True if this upgrade reaches the FINAL tier — triggers the programme exit procedure (transfer to standard banking app via CAP.BSP.002.EXT). False otherwise.
